rule_hits.summary: Lists references supporting the paper's claims and methodologies, including academic articles and online resources.
This paper reviews the challenges and solutions of combining generative AI with game theory, highlighting its advantages over traditional non-AI and discriminative AI approaches...
The paper titled 'Exploring Equilibrium Strategies in Network Games with Generative AI' is authored by Yaoqi Yang, Hongyang Du, Geng Sun, Zehui Xiong, Dusit Niyato, and Zhu Han.
Proposes a generative AI-enabled game theoretical framework to optimize ML model performance under false data injection attacks, including a case study and results analysis.
